description_long: This is a polygonal, octagonal wooden cup with a rugged, medieval-inspired design. The exterior is primarily dark brown wood, accented by two wide, horizontal tan bands encircling the body. The surface is adorned with patches of green moss and a prominent set of red claw marks, giving it a weathered, rustic appearance. The handle is thick, angular, and colored in a muted tan, contrasting with the wood grain of the cup. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter, possibly metallic or ceramic material, and the cup is open at the top. The overall look suggests it could be found in a fantasy tavern or as a decorative piece in an urban park or themed restaurant.
description: A rugged, octagonal wooden cup with tan bands, mossy patches, and a thick angular handle. Features claw marks and a weathered, rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right, claw marks, moss, and both tan bands clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered, obscuring most of the cup's body, and tan bands partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing the claw marks and moss patches on the cup's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle visible, focusing on the octagonal shape and tan bands.
